sources.note: Digital twin of a road embankment in Utqiagvik; two ~1 km fiber-optic cables, thermal + seismic, Sept 2021 to June 2024; Ming Xiao quote; permafrost warming up to almost 2 degrees F per decade.
Independent confirmation of method, cable specs, data window, and the 'billions of dollars' infrastructure-damage framing.

sources.outlet: JGR: Earth Surface (the peer-reviewed paper, DOI 10.1029/2025JF008787)
sources.note: Physics-informed digital twin for predicting permafrost thermodynamic characteristics under an embankment road in Utqiagvik, Alaska.
AGU editor highlight on the same digital-twin work.
